message:
fix(convoy): propagate merge=direct strategy via attachment fields (gt-7b6wf)

Store convoy_id and merge_strategy as attachment fields on the issue bead
at sling time, then read them back at done time. This fixes the bug where
cross-rig dep resolution failed at gt done, causing merge=direct convoys
to go through the regular merge queue instead.

Adds fallback chain in done.go for backward compatibility with pre-fix issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
